name: pace-extension
description: Pace — minimalist pace-setting Chrome extension with enforced recovery.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && vite build -c vite.content.config.ts
scripts.build:store: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode store && vite build -c vite.content.config.ts --mode store && node tools/strip-dev-manifest.mjs
